name: happy-path-variant-b
task: Add an options chain lookup tool to the chat system. Users should be able to ask 'show me the options chain for AAPL' and get call/put data. Use the Massive API options chain endpoint. Put the domain logic in a new options domain or extend an existing one.
assertions: Response uses `npx -y massive-cli options chain --underlying <ticker>` as the CLI command pattern
Response includes optional filter parameters for `--type` (call/put), `--strike`, and `--expiration` in the tool definition
Response adds shared response types in `shared/types/` for the options chain data
Response creates a domain directory structure with at minimum `router.ts` and `client.ts` files
